name: ai-card-check
title: AI card check (generate from a cited source, then verify)
summary: Generated 54 MC items from one cited source; gold set 50 Q/A.
Pre-registered cutoff: wrong <= 0 AND correct+useful >= 60% of generated.
nulls: 1 generated card(s) were WRONG (unsupported by the source) and BLOCKED - a wrong fact is worse than no card, and one failure fails the batch.
4 card(s) were correct but bad teaching (vague/trivial/duplicate/leak) and BLOCKED.
